1.title: Cloud Initiate
1.description: lowest sworn rank; launch-deck service, messenger duty, emergency rigging

2.title: Wind Scout
2.description: reconnaissance rank; canopy patrols, glider watch, signal flare duty

3.title: Aether Deckhand
3.description: shipboard specialist; ballast, sail, engine, and cargo safety

4.title: Storm Lancer
4.description: frontline aerial infantry; boarding pikes and skyhook assaults

5.title: Skybinder
5.description: warding technician; aether anchors, rope bridges, and anti-fall fields

6.title: Gale Sergeant
6.description: squad command; tactical discipline and combat rescue

7.title: High Aeronaut
7.description: ship officer; navigation through storms, low orbit, and hazard fronts

8.title: Cloud Marshal
8.description: regional commander; rules a flight wing and arbitration council

9.title: Storm Commander
9.description: fleet strategist; command authority over multiple ship groups

10.title: Sky Warden Prime
10.description: highest active rank below the Founder; emergency command authority

11.title: Founder
11.description: reserved rank only; no active Sky Warden member asset in this pack
